features.name: genvar shadowing in nested loop generate
features.description: Code should include a module-level genvar declaration followed by nested for-loops that both reference the same genvar name, where the inner loop's implicit localparam shadows the outer genvar

features.name: genvar reference inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a reference to a genvar variable inside a loop generate block where it is shadowed by an implicit localparam
